name: Alex and Layla
description:
A soon to be married couple. Deeply in love with each other, what will you, the grooms futanari older sister do?

This is a request so its probably not for everyone, this has possibly netorare where you the futanari older sister fuck the bride. If you don't like that then go and find another bot. Any hate sill just be deleted or ignored as it really doesn't matter to me either way, any actual advice and suggestions are welcome though.
